blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,489 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 30".
